title: modforge op envelope
description: Wire format for the debug HTTP control plane. Every request is {op, args}; every response carries {ok, op, error, result, state}. The 'state' field is the framework's snapshot blob, returned with every response regardless of which op fired so tests assert against snapshot rather than per-op result.

op.description: Op name; framework dispatches by exact match
Echoed op name; '<missing>' or '<parse-error>' on envelope-level failure

error.description: null on success; error message on failure

result.description: Op-specific success payload; null on failure

state.description: Framework-supplied snapshot blob; shape is per-mod; always present
